hooks.command:
node -e "const m=(process.env.CLAUDE_USER_PROMPT||'').toLowerCase(); const tips=[]; if(/migration|schema|column|table/.test(m))tips.push('Reminder: read server/CLAUDE.md (Sequelize section); use the sequelize-migration skill.'); if(/checkout|payment|stripe|card/.test(m))tips.push('Reminder: payments are SIMULATED — see PAYMENTS.md. Card 4000000000000002 must always fail.'); if(/admin|role|guard|jwt/.test(m))tips.push('Reminder: spawn access-control-auditor after admin/auth changes.'); if(tips.length)console.log('
[ArgosC hints]
'+tips.join('
'));"

powershell -NoProfile -Command "try { Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; $n = New-Object System.Windows.Forms.NotifyIcon; $n.Icon = [System.Drawing.SystemIcons]::Information; $n.Visible = $true; $n.ShowBalloonTip(3000, 'ArgosC', 'Claude finished a task', 'Info'); Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $n.Dispose() } catch {}"
